citation_and_locator: Matthews & Yip, Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar, 2nd ed.; official CUHK supplement, Chapter 8.3.3 “The JEUNG construction”; example 佢將啲污糟衫周圍擗
what_it_supports: Direct attestation of Subject + 將 + classifier-bearing affected NP + handling/displacement predicate in modern Hong Kong Cantonese.
limit: One reference-grammar example does not establish unrestricted predicate or NP productivity, regional uniformity, or frequency.

citation_and_locator: Mai, Kwan & Yip 2018, Expressing displacement in heritage Cantonese: Cross-linguistic influence and structural vulnerability, International Journal of Bilingualism 22(6):603-618, DOI 10.1177/1367006916681084
what_it_supports: Experimental elicitation treats pretransitive zoeng, canonical, and topicalization structures separately; 17 Hong Kong native baseline speakers preferred zoeng in displacement contexts.
limit: The abstract supports displacement-task production, not every predicate class, exact syntactic theory, or ordinary-conversation frequency.

citation_and_locator: Yao 2018, NP interpretation and disposal variations among the Mandarin, Cantonese, and Shaoxing dialects, Language and Linguistics 19(2):306-332, DOI 10.1075/lali.00011.yao; publisher abstract and author-uploaded uncorrected proof
what_it_supports: Provides a competing analysis in which Cantonese favors SVCO, reports register/lexical susceptibility of Jeung clauses, and analyzes disposal NPs as definite, specific, or generic.
limit: The paper contests a broad Jeung generalization; individual question-marked examples are author judgments and must not be converted directly into universal parser negatives. Its bare-NP discussion requires direct reconciliation with Cheung 1992.

citation_and_locator: Luke & Wong 2015, The Hong Kong Cantonese Corpus: Design and Uses; official fcbond/hkcancor repository, CC BY 4.0, UTF-8 archive at master commit 39aeadf920e0b5ca93d0ad7792c59e740e7bdd65, SHA-256 09223963b8756254e15353cad843f8a4b0cbc4b9223dc8a8fa27fb1cf846057e
what_it_supports: Provides 15 adjudicated complete utterances with 將 across physical displacement, placement, transformation, inscription, communication, institutional/financial change, and abstract construal; also attests several NP profiles and contextually recoverable subjects.
limit: Corpus production establishes occurrence, not acceptability contrasts or unrestricted productivity; repair-marked and quoted tokens remain explicitly qualified.

citation_and_locator: Leung & Li 2016, Cantonese LARSP: A Procedure for Assessment and Remediation for Cantonese-speaking Children, in Profiling Grammar, pp.172-197, DOI 10.21832/9781783094875-011; examples (21)-(22), pp.179-180
what_it_supports: Provides an author-constructed semantically matched SVO/pretransitive pair: 我搣開個橙 versus 我將個橙搣開.
limit: The pair illustrates the authors' analysis; it is not identified as a child-corpus token, a preference result, or a negative boundary.

citation_and_locator: Cheung, Samuel Hung-nin 1992/1993, The Pretransitive in Cantonese, Chinese Languages and Linguistics 1:241-303; republished as chapter 8 in Cheung 2023, Cantonese: Since the 19th Century, pp.151-208, DOI 10.2307/jj.6988039.8; CUHK Press and JSTOR open-access records checked
what_it_supports: Confirms the foundational dedicated study, its exact open-access republication, chapter locator, and stable DOI.
limit: JSTOR exposed the official PDF endpoint but returned an anti-bot HTTP 403 in this environment; chapter examples, argument, and exact constraints were therefore not treated as inspected.

citation_and_locator: Kataoka 2023, Disposal construction and related issues in Peking Mandarin and Cantonese in the nineteenth century, in Early Chinese Dialect Grammar, pp.335-359
what_it_supports: Supports a historical research question involving competition between 𢬿 and 將 in nineteenth-century Cantonese.
limit: Historical marker distribution cannot establish present-day productivity, register, or parser boundaries.
